message:
fix(codegen): Remove assertTrue/False/In/NotIn from inline assertions list

Problem:
- assertTrue, assertFalse, assertIn, assertNotIn were in inline_assertions list
- But these generate `try unittest.assertXxx(...)` function calls, not inline if statements
- This caused missing semicolons between consecutive calls, breaking compilation

Root cause analysis:
- genAssertTrue/False use gen1ArgAssert() → emits "try unittest.assertTrue(...)"
- genAssertIn uses direct emit → emits "try unittest.assertIn(...)"
- genAssertNotIn uses gen2ArgAssert() → emits "try unittest.assertNotIn(...)"
- Only assertEqual/NotEqual/Less/LessEqual/Greater/GreaterEqual emit inline if statements

Solution:
- Reduced inline_assertions list to only 6 methods that generate inline if:
  * assertEqual, assertNotEqual
  * assertLess, assertLessEqual, assertGreater, assertGreaterEqual
- All other assertions now fall through to normal path and get semicolons/newlines

Test results:
- test_unary now passes completely (13/13 tests)
- test_binop compiles successfully (was failing with ';' errors)
- test_bool compiles successfully
- test_float compiles (different errors: missing _testcapi, pow_op.call issue)

Files changed:
- expr_stmt.zig: lines 54-61 - reduced inline_assertions list from 10 to 6 methods
